name: Farming Life in Another World - WN Chapter Checker

parameters.query: SELECT data FROM key_value_store WHERE name = '{{ $json.uniqueName }}'
SELECT data FROM key_value_store WHERE name = 'PERSONAL_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID'

parameters.text:
=🎉 *New Chapter Available!*

📖 *Farming Life in Another World*

*Chapter {{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.currentChapter }} – {{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.chapterName }}*
{{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.storedChapter ? '_(Previous: Chapter ' + $('Compare Chapters').item.json.storedChapter + ')_' : '_(First time checking)_' }}

🔗 [Read Now]({{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.chapterUrl }})

parameters.query: INSERT INTO key_value_store (name, data) VALUES ('{{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.uniqueName }}', '{{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.currentChapter }}') ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET data = '{{ $('Compare Chapters').item.json.currentChapter }}'
SELECT data FROM key_value_store WHERE name = 'PERSONAL_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID'

nodes.name: Get Telegram Chat ID for Error

main.node: Get Telegram Chat ID for Error
